svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="q6I7NEZGhy4pBer1LoII" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-556" dy="-206" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;" value="Network Topology" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="200" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="internet" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.cisco.sites.generic_building;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Internet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="490" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="internet-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontStyle=2;" value="no inbound ports" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="470" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-blocked" edge="1" parent="1" source="internet" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=14;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=3;fontColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="dns-box" value="✕"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dns-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="DNS: *.yourdomain → host LAN IP
(Cloudflare DNS records, internal only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="320" x="360" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lan-user" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.cisco.computers_and_peripherals.pc;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="LAN Browser" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="70" y="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-user-dns" edge="1" parent="1" source="lan-user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="dns-box" value="HTTPS request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="host-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=35;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;container=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Host Network (claudebox)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="280" x="40" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-claudedesktop" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Claude Desktop
(GUI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="20" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-claudecode" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Claude Code
(agent runtime)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="150" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-guac" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Guacamole
(port 8080)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="20" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-qmd" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="qmd HTTP
(port 8181)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="150" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-cui" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="CUI
(port 3001)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="20" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-pm2" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="PM2
(cron jobs, no ports)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="150" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-memsearch" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="memsearch
(no port, stdio)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="20" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h-graphiti" parent="host-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Graphiti MCP
(port 8000)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="150" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="docker-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=35;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;container=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Docker Bridge Network (claudebox-net)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="640" x="380" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-swag" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="swag
(port 443 → host)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="20" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-authelia" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="authelia
(port 9091, SSO)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="220" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-swag-auth" edge="1" parent="docker-box" source="d-swag" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d-authelia" value="auth_request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-librechat" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="librechat
(port 3080)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="430" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-swag-lc" edge="1" parent="docker-box" source="d-swag" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d-librechat" value="proxy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-dockhand" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="dockhand
(port 3000)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="220" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-swag-dh" edge="1" parent="docker-box" source="d-swag" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d-dockhand" value="proxy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-opennotebook" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="open-notebook
(port 8502)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="430" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-swag-on" edge="1" parent="docker-box" source="d-swag" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d-opennotebook" value="proxy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-searxng" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="searxng + valkey
(web search)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="220" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-lc-sx" edge="1" parent="docker-box" source="d-librechat" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d-searxng" value="web search"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="505" y="150" /> <mxPoint x="295" y="150" /> <mxPoint x="295" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-mongodb" parent="docker-box" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" value="mongodb" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="430" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-meilisearch" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" value="meilisearch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="545" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d-cui-proxy" parent="docker-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" value="→ host.docker.internal:3001 (CUI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="20" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-swag-cui" edge="1" parent="docker-box" source="d-swag" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0;exitY=0.9;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d-cui-proxy" value="proxy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-lc-qmd" edge="1" parent="1" source="d-librechat" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="h-qmd" value="RAG search"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="835" y="540" /> <mxPoint x="835" y="610" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="610" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="455" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ssl-note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;" value="SSL via Cloudflare DNS validation (no HTTP challenge).
Domain resolves to LAN IP — internal access only." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="380" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-dns-swag" edge="1" parent="1" source="dns-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d-swag" value="resolves to host:443"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="520" y="280" /> <mxPoint x="475" y="280" /> <mxPoint x="475" y="310" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
